name: AI literature review — sensitivity baseline

input.generatePrompt: Write a literature review section about the current state of antibiotic resistance in hospital-acquired infections, focusing on MRSA and carbapenem-resistant Enterobacteriaceae. Discuss prevalence, risk factors, treatment options, and infection control strategies. Write approximately 300 words in academic style.

qualityCriteria: AI-generated literature review scores ≤30% human probability
At least 2 paragraphs flagged as AI
Literature reviews are prime AI detection territory — generic summaries
